instructions_to_main_agent: Refactor ALL styling from baby blue/orange to a clean, monochrome gradient Apple-like aesthetic.

Apply an Apple-style gradient: The overall page background should transition seamlessly from crisp white (#FFFFFF) at the top to #F5F5F7 as the user scrolls. You can use bg-gradient-to-b from-white to-[#F5F5F7] on the main container.
Remove all neo-brutalist styling (heavy borders, hard offsets, bright colors).
Use frosted glass (backdrop-blur-xl, bg-white/70, border-white/20, soft shadow) for the floating navigation, sticky headers, and key cards.
CTA buttons must be deep dark charcoal (#1D1D1F) pill shapes with smooth hover state (scale up, soft glow shadow).
Implement the large TZOUL wordmark on the hero, using large fluid typography, keeping it premium and effortless.
Style Finder quiz and Multi-step booking modal should use smooth transitions (framer-motion) and frosted glass overlays.
Scrolling ticker/marquee should be monochrome, elegant, not loud. Use a slow organic drift.
Admin dashboard should follow 'Control Room' grid layout but maintain the clean Apple monochrome aesthetic (no teal or blue).
Every interactive and key informational element MUST include a `data-testid` attribute (e.g., data-testid='book-now-button').
Use pure HTML + Tailwind for marketing layout structure, but you can use customized Shadcn for forms/dialogs.
Do not use generic font like Inter. Outfit for headings (tracking-tight) and Manrope for body are excellent.
Avoid full-screen image overlays that make things too dark; keep the crisp light feel alive.

brand_wordmark.style: Tracking-tighter, ultra-large fluid scale, bold but elegant.

body.style: Clean, highly readable, generous line height, muted grey text for contrast.

surfaces_and_shadows.glass_cards: bg-white/60 backdrop-blur-2xl border border-white/40 shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgb(0,0,0,0.04)] rounded-3xl
surfaces_and_shadows.buttons: rounded-full bg-[#1D1D1F] text-white shadow-[0_4px_14px_rgba(0,0,0,0.1)] hover:shadow-[0_6px_20px_rgba(0,0,0,0.15)] hover:-translate-y-0.5 transition-all duration-300
surfaces_and_shadows.modals: backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/80 border border-white/50 shadow-2xl rounded-[2rem]
surfaces_and_shadows.inputs: bg-white/50 border border-black/5 rounded-xl focus:border-black/20 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-black/20 transition-all

layout.spacing: Generous. Use p-8, p-12, gap-8. Containers with borders must have internal padding.
layout.grids: Use asymmetrical bento grids for services and gallery. Use dense, clean grids for admin dashboard.
layout.alignment: Optical alignment. Left-align dense content, center-align hero.
